steps.title: Rewrite the expression
steps.content:
The expression inside the square can be combined into one fraction.
$$\frac{1}{2}x-\frac{37}{2}=\frac{x-37}{2}$$
So the equation becomes
$$\bigl(\frac{x-37}{2}\bigr)^2-81=0$$

steps.title: Isolate the target expression
steps.content: Move $81$ to the other side and multiply by $4$. $$\bigl(\frac{x-37}{2}\bigr)^2=81$$ $$\frac{(x-37)^2}{4}=81$$ $$(x-37)^2=324$$ The answer is A.
